projects.name: Player1205/GuardCall
projects.description: GuardCall is a real-time, AI-powered scam protection PWA. Built with a strict TypeScript MERN stack, it leverages Deepgram for live audio transcription and Groq AI to instantly detect malicious intent, psychological manipulation, and financial fraud. It features on-device PII scrubbing, dynamic risk scoring, and a premium glassmorphism UI.
projects.full_description: GuardCall is a real-time, AI-powered scam protection PWA. Built with a strict TypeScript MERN stack, it leverages Deepgram for live audio transcription and Groq AI to instantly detect malicious intent, psychological manipulation, and financial fraud. It features on-device PII scrubbing, dynamic risk scoring, and a premium glassmorphism UI.

projects.name: Mania4rta/How-to-Bypass-Telegram-Desktop-QR-Code-and-SMS-Verification-via-SMS-MAN
projects.description: This sms-activate review explores how SMS-MAN can be used for legitimate SMS verification workflows related to Telegram in 2026. As messaging platforms continue to strengthen account security, reliable phone verification remains an important part of account registration, login protection, and recovery procedures.
projects.full_description: This sms-activate review explores how SMS-MAN can be used for legitimate SMS verification workflows related to Telegram in 2026. As messaging platforms continue to strengthen account security, reliable phone verification remains an important part of account registration, login protection, and recovery procedures.

projects.name: Mania4rta/Fintech-Access-Registering-International-Payment-Apps-with-SMS-MAN-Numbers
projects.description: This sms-activate review explores how SMS-MAN supports legitimate SMS verification workflows for fintech applications and digital payment platforms in 2026. As financial technology services continue expanding globally, reliable phone verification remains an essential part of account security, onboarding, and authentication processes.
projects.full_description: This sms-activate review explores how SMS-MAN supports legitimate SMS verification workflows for fintech applications and digital payment platforms in 2026. As financial technology services continue expanding globally, reliable phone verification remains an essential part of account security, onboarding, and authentication processes.
